name: Auxo Celsius Vaporizer
summary: A dual-heating portable vaporiser for dry herb and concentrates with app control, for patients who want one device for both materials.
description: The Auxo Celsius handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a separate concentrate chamber included. Conduction and infrared heating cover a wide 140-260C range across four preset levels, with finer adjustment through the companion app, and the stainless steel heater is easy to clean. USB-C fast charging gives around 90 minutes of use per charge, and it can be used while charging above 20%. Note the app is Android and web only, not iOS. Backed by a 10-year warranty, it suits patients who want a single versatile device for both flower and extracts.
